display.purpose: Hero couple names only. Extralight at extreme sizes — feels engraved, not printed.

headline.purpose: One per section. Section titles like 'Will you be there?' or 'The Way of Water'.

title.purpose: Card headers, hotel names, timeline event titles. Normal weight for contrast.

body.purpose: Story paragraphs, FAQ answers, guest messages. Light, generous leading.

label.purpose: Nav links, form labels, countdown units. Uppercase + wide tracking = ceremonial formality.

shadows.name: hero-overlay-top
shadows.purpose: Hero top-vignette — darkens sky, preserves couple.

shadows.name: hero-overlay-bottom
shadows.value: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(5,2,15,0.97) 0%, rgba(10,4,25,0.88) 25%, rgba(15,6,35,0.55) 50%, transparent 75%)
shadows.purpose: Hero bottom — makes text legible, creates cinematic depth.

shadows.name: hero-warm-radial
shadows.purpose: Warm centre glow suggesting firelight on water.

shadows.name: glass-card-rest
shadows.purpose: Glass-gold card at rest. Four-layer: specular top, glass edge, ambient, gold rim.

shadows.name: glass-card-hover
shadows.purpose: Card hover — warm gold aura, replaces rest shadow.

shadows.name: button-primary
shadows.purpose: Gold CTA glow — makes button feel lit from within.

shadows.name: nav-bar
shadows.purpose: Nav bottom-edge separation. Barely perceptible — just enough to float.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all entrances and layout transitions.

motion.name: ease-material
motion.purpose: Digit flip in countdown, fast snappy transitions.

motion.name: spring-cta
motion.purpose: Primary button hover/tap spring. Responsive without bouncing.

motion.name: spring-cursor
motion.purpose: 5-dot cursor trail, each dot progressively softer spring.

motion.name: stagger-children
motion.purpose: Hero text entrance. Elements stagger in from below.

motion.name: lotus-rotate
motion.purpose: Decorative lotus watermark rotation. Disabled on prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: float-particle
motion.purpose: Gold diamond particles rising from hero base. Disabled on prefers-reduced-motion.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile→tablet layout shift. Hero min-height, nav desktop links, grid columns.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single gold CTA. Used for RSVP Now (hero), Count me in (form), Go Now (games prompt). Never more than one per viewport.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #B8850A, #E8C547, #C49A28); color: #2A1200; padding: 13px 44px; border-radius: 100px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(196,154,40,0.45), 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.25) inset; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: scale(1.06); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C49A28; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 100px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

components.name: Ghost Pill Button
components.description: Secondary CTAs in navigation (Menu, Trivia). Never competes with the primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; color: #C49A28; background: rgba(196,154,40,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(196,154,40,0.25); border-radius: 100px; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.09em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(196,154,40,0.18); border-color: rgba(196,154,40,0.4); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C49A28; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 100px; }

components.name: Glass-Gold Card
components.description: The signature container. Used for RSVP form, invite detail panels, address cards, hotel rows on hover.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { background: rgba(255,253,248,0.52); backdrop-filter: blur(48px) saturate(200%) brightness(1.04); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(48px) saturate(200%) brightness(1.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.72); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.38); border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.5px rgba(255,255,255,0.5) inset, 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6) inset, 0 -1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.04) inset, 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 0 0 0.5px rgba(196,154,40,0.12); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94), box-shadow 0.3s; } .ds-glass-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(196,154,40,0.16); }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Text inputs and selects in the RSVP form. Warm ivory, gold ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(196,154,40,0.2); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255,253,246,0.7); color: #5C3A2E; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(196,154,40,0.4); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #C4B09A; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top nav with frosted ivory background, gold top-accent bar, lotus-diamond logo.
components.html: N ✦ PThe Way of WaterRSVP
components.css: .ds-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 50; background: rgba(255,253,246,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(160%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(160%); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(196,154,40,0.15); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(196,154,40,0.08), 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); padding: 14px 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-nav::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, #C49A28 30%, #E8C547 50%, #C49A28 70%, transparent 100%); opacity: 0.7; } .ds-nav-logo { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: #5C3A2E; } .ds-nav-star { color: #C49A28; font-size: 11px; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.09em; color: #7C5A3A; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 2px; border-bottom: 1.5px solid transparent; transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; margin-left: 28px; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #C49A28; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #C49A28; border-bottom-color: #C49A28; }

components.name: Section Ornament
components.description: Gold lotus-diamond SVG divider. Appears at the top of every content section before the heading. Non-negotiable rhythm anchor.
components.css: .ds-ornament { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-ornament-rule { flex: 1; max-width: 120px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, rgba(196,154,40,0.3)); } .ds-ornament-rule:last-child { background: linear-gradient(to left, transparent, rgba(196,154,40,0.3)); }

components.name: Countdown Card
components.description: Mini frosted-glass card in the hero for days/hours/minutes/seconds. Animated digit flip on change.
components.css: .ds-countdown-card { min-width: 74px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); backdrop-filter: blur(28px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(28px); border: 1px solid rgba(196,154,40,0.28); border-radius: 18px; padding: 14px 6px 10px; text-align: center; } .ds-countdown-number { font-size: 38px; font-weight: 100; color: white; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; overflow: hidden; height: 1.1em; } .ds-countdown-label { font-size: 9px; color: rgba(196,154,40,0.65); letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 8px; }

narrative.overview:
This is a site built around a single extraordinary image: two people exchanging vows on a floating mandap, surrounded by water, flowers, and firelight. Every design decision draws from that image — the warm gold of oil lamps on still water, the frosted glass of reflections, the slow ritual weight of ceremony. The system is intimate before it is impressive. It does not announce itself; it pulls you in.

The palette glows from within rather than dazzling from without. Surfaces are warm ivory — the colour of candlelight on white cloth — with gold used sparingly as a signal of importance: a name, a button, a divider. The jali diamond lattice sits beneath everything at near-invisibility, a cultural anchor that rewards close attention.

This system explicitly rejects all-white, cold editorial minimalism — the kind of luxury that signals restraint over warmth. The Indian identity — the lotus, the jali, the floating mandap — is structural, not decorative.
keyCharacteristics: Warm ivory body with a near-invisible golden jali pattern
Gold is the single accent; used at ≤15% surface area, its rarity is the point
Frosted glass cards float content above the textured background
Typography is extralight at large sizes — names feel carved, not printed
Cinematic hero with full-bleed parallax; all other sections are essentially flat
Indian ornamental motifs (lotus, mandala, diamond) used authentically, never pastiche

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Gold is used on ≤15% of any given screen. Its restraint is the source of its power. When everything glows gold, nothing does.

rules.name: The No Cold Rule
rules.body: There are no greys, blues, or neutral blacks in this system. Every colour is warm. A #666 text colour would read as intrusive; reach for #9C7A5A instead.

rules.name: The Extralight Headline Rule
rules.body: Section headings are always weight 100. Never bold a section title. The lightness is what gives the words room to carry meaning.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Outside the hero, surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as response to hover or the glass-gold treatment.

dos: Use #FFFDF6 (Warm Ivory) as the body background — never #FFFFFF
Use <SectionOrnament /> at the top of every content section before the heading
Apply Temple Gold (#C49A28) only where it matters — CTAs, active states, ornaments
Use the glass-gold card for any floating content panel
Honour Indian cultural identity structurally — the jali, lotus, and mandala are load-bearing
Respect prefers-reduced-motion on lotus rotation, particles, and cursor effects
Keep touch targets at minimum 44px on mobile
Write copy that rewards close reading — the wit is deliberate, match the tone
donts: Don't use all-white, cold editorial minimalism — this is the primary anti-reference
Don't add cool colours — no greys, blue-greys, or neutral blacks
Don't make the jali background pattern more prominent — 13% opacity is the ceiling
Don't bold section headings — weight 100 is correct and intentional
Don't use burgundy (#8B2252) as a primary accent — it is reserved for rare whisper moments
Don't add drop shadows to section backgrounds outside the hero and glass-gold cards
Don't introduce a new typeface without strong justification
Don't use generic wedding stock imagery or emoji-decorated UI
Don't apply the gold gradient button style to secondary actions
